author: franciskafieh
description: Link all modified files meeting certain criteria to a daily note.

manifest.author: Francis Kafieh
manifest.description: The advanced and adaptive changelog. Links all modified files meeting certain criteria to a timed (daily, weekly, monthly) note.
manifest.name: List Modified

name: List Modified

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Primarily a sync-centric bug fix update

Fixed #137 - duplicate dividers (as a result of sync issues or otherwise) now do not cause an endless loop
Fixed #133 - Specific GoodSync patch now excludes log files for GoodSync users

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
QOL: the plugin now auto re-validates every note to ensure it matches new criteria when a criteria setting is changed.

Bug Fix: when a note is deleted, the plugin will no longer disregard the criteria settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added #130 : option to disable previews for linking of canvases
- Fixed #128 / #127 : not having dividers in the created, modified, deleted order causing tracking issues

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added feature #104 - ability to sort output lists

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added feature #126 - you can now choose to keep dividers after every new period instead of them being automatically deleted. SEE: "auto remove dividers" setting
- Fixed bug #124 - Removing dividers of old log notes no longer considered a modification, no longer gets listed in new log note

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Patch #123 - added exclude filetypes to the modify logic, now if you exclude a filetype it will also exclude the file when it is modified.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: fr #123 - added a setting to exclude user-provided filetypes from deleted notes. This is mostly useful if other plugins/sync services create files with a certain extension. Using this setting can help clean up your note lists.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Changes:
- add disable plugin locally setting to resolve sync issues for many users
- fix #120 first modified note of the day sometimes being tracked as "created" instead of "modified"
- QOL fix: moving/renaming a file now instantly re-checks if it matches criteria instead of requiring the file to be edited.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed #122 - dividers not being found with leading/trailing whitespace present

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed tag exclusions not working
- Potential fix for syncthing bug when using mobile devices #119

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- added debug setting to manually reset all tracked files and to force refresh changes
- fixed bug where the plugin would always consider yesterday as the last note
- fixed bug where new note logic would not delete old modifications
- added URIs to [output format](https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/wiki/Output-Format)

Thank you for 100 stars :sweat_smile: :heart:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## **THIS UPDATE CONTAINS BREAKING CHANGES. This is the first 3.x.x public release, as it was previously in alpha.**

The main change is that the plugin now uses dividers instead of headers as a placeholder to put your lists. This makes the plugin way more flexible.

Please read [the wiki](https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/wiki) for changes and configuration.


## Other Output Format Changes
- You can now use frontmatter properties as templates/placeholder values in your output format!
- You may now have a different output format for every list (created/modified/deleted)
- Deleted output format is now customizable
- See the [Output Format](https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/wiki/Output-Format) wiki for more details on this.
- FIX: duplicate tags in output

## Small Changes
- 3.1.3 specifically adds some settings description improvements
- UI now adheres to Obsidian principles
- dev testing improvements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed #108 duplicate tags
releases.name: 3.1.2-alpha

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Same changes as 3.1.0, but they work this time! :wink: 

Lots of dev changes to allow for better testing
The UI is also slightly different to adhere to the Obsidian UI recommendations
releases.name: 3.1.1-alpha

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
CHANGES:
- You can now use frontmatter properties as templates/placeholder values in your output format!
- You may now have a different output format for every list (created/modified/deleted)
- Deleted output format is now customizable
- See the [Output Format](https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/wiki/Output-Format) wiki for more details

** REMINDER: this is a **breaking** release if upgrading from 2.x.x. It will also need to be installed manually or with BRAT. Please see the 3.0.0-alpha release page for more information.
releases.name: 3.1.0-alpha

releases.author: franciskafieh

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description: fixed #76 (more ignored criteria not working)

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description:
- fixed #72 (ignore tags not working)
- #74 (no longer create H3s if no content is underneath it)
- some of the problems with #54 (now the modified subheading is automatically removed if you do not want the plugin to separate created and deleted files)

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description: Fixed #69 -- change primary heading to h2, secondary headings to h3. Please note that **all content from the primary heading's h2 to the next h2 in the note is deleted with every update**. This may be changed in the future.

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description:
Whew, this is a big one!!!

**Mainly:**
- huge code refactor! now the code is much cleaner and modular. Should now be easier for contributors to follow.
- option to separate created and deleted files
- added an option to use Periodic Note's weekly and monthly notes (as opposed to just standard daily notes)
- added an option to append blank lines after every heading
- fixed a TON of bugs
- revamped the settings UI

Sorry for the super long wait, everyone. I was caught in the middle of exams and the end of my school semester. I never expected this project to grow as much as it has, and I've spent a lot of time on it as a result. I've decided to open a donation link, which has been added to the readme! If this plugin has helped you in any way, feel free to support me! Thanks so much :)

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description:
another temporary until 2.1 comes out

fixes heading reverting to default if not present in file (#55)

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description:
Temporary public release of 2.0.2 until 2.1 comes out!

Added all the features of 2.0.1 + an option for intervals between log file writes

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description:
- Added mechanism to migrate from 1.0
- Updated deps

**PLEASE READ CURRENT OPEN 2.0 ISSUES BEFORE USING A PRE-RELEASE! If any of these issues may affect you, stick with 1.3.3 for now.**

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description:
Lots changed!

- You can now choose a heading to list your modified files under!
- You can now edit the modified link list format to display tags, file name without linking, and created date
- Listed notes are now dynamic!! This means that if you delete a note, rename it, or add an excluded tag/folder, it will update on the list (i.e. the name will be changed, or the file will be unlisted!)

**This is a major re-write of the plugin! Use with caution, as many bugs may be present**

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add support for an empty new line at the end of the daily file by @Trikzon in https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/pull/2
* Plugins should go inside the plugins folder by @mtrifiro in https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/pull/6
* Fixed bug where plugin would throw errors if a note had no links
  
## New Contributors
* @Trikzon made their first contribution in https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/pull/2
* @mtrifiro made their first contribution in https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/pull/6

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/franciskafieh/obsidian-list-modified/compare/0.0.1...0.0.2
releases.name: Release 0.0.2 - bugfix

releases.author: franciskafieh
releases.description: This is the initial release of the plugin. The code in this release needs to be refactored, but it should not contain any bugs since it is so simple. If there are any bugs, please create a PR or an issue! Since this is a pre-release, please backup your notes before using!
releases.name: Release 0.0.1 - Initial
